ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the financial document:  Euro India Fresh Foods Limited (EIFFL) is progressing with a preferential issue of 2.11 million equity shares, aiming to raise approximately INR 51.7 crores from 82 non-promoter investors. The Board approved replacing several original proposed allottees who were deemed ineligible under SEBI regulations and issued a corrigendum to the Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) notice based on National Stock Exchange (NSE) observations. The ineligibility of initial allottees and the necessity of NSE-driven corrections suggest potential initial diligence issues regarding regulatory compliance in the preferential issue process, despite the eventual capital infusion.
